knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Coffee Break when a small heritage F&B operator worries that workforce systems are too heavy; start with accurate clock-in, then expand into timesheets when ready.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Family-run hawker/F&B team needed more accurate clock-in data and a better base for staff retention.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny gave them a quick starting point for clock-in accuracy and room to expand into timesheets/integrations later.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: SG small-chain or family-run F&B/hawker operators with clock-in accuracy, retention, or lightweight-system concerns.
